mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.album_id, r.title, r.content, r.cover_image, COALESCE(LEAST(10.0, AVG(c.score)), r.score) AS score, r.publish_time, r.update_time, u.username AS author_name, a.title AS album_title, a.artist, a.genre, a.release_date FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = r.author_id LEFT JOIN album a ON a.id = r.album_id LEFT JOIN comment c ON c.content_id = r.id AND c.content_type = 'REVIEW' AND c.score IS NOT NULL WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.status = 'PUBLISHED' GROUP BY r.id, r.album_id, r.title, r.content, r.cover_image, r.score, r.publish_time, r.update_time, u.username, a.title, a.artist, a.genre, a.release_date
